Communication.Expert: Student! consistently demonstrates expert ATL skills in Communication, expressing ideas clearly and listening actively in all activities.
Communication.Practitioner: Student! generally demonstrates practitioner ATL skills in Communication, and with continued effort, He! will express His! reasoning even more effectively.
Communication.Beginner: Student! demonstrates beginner ATL skills in Communication, though there is room to strengthen His! confidence when presenting ideas.
Communication.Novice: Student! is currently demonstrating novice ATL skills in Communication, and is encouraged to participate more actively in discussions to support His! overall progress.

Social.Expert: Student! consistently demonstrates expert ATL skills in collaboration, cooperating productively and showing strong leadership in group tasks.
Social.Practitioner: Student! generally demonstrates practitioner ATL skills in collaboration, working harmoniously with peers to complete group assignments.
Social.Beginner: Student! demonstrates beginner ATL skills in collaboration, though He! should focus on participating more equitably in team discussions.
Social.Novice: Student! is currently demonstrating novice ATL skills in collaboration, and is encouraged to cooperate more actively with peers to achieve shared targets.

Self-Management.Expert: Student! consistently demonstrates expert ATL skills in Self-Management, approaching all tasks with strong focus, organization, and a growth mindset.
Self-Management.Practitioner: Student! generally demonstrates practitioner ATL skills in Self-Management, managing His! time effectively and preparing well for lessons.
Self-Management.Beginner: Student! demonstrates beginner ATL skills in Self-Management, though there is room to strengthen His! focus and consistency when completing independent tasks.
Self-Management.Novice: Student! is currently demonstrating novice ATL skills in Self-Management, and is encouraged to engage and manage His! time more effectively.

Research.Expert: Student! consistently demonstrates expert ATL skills in Research, showing superb information literacy when gathering and citing source information.
Research.Practitioner: Student! generally demonstrates practitioner ATL skills in Research, successfully finding and interpreting relevant data.
Research.Beginner: Student! demonstrates beginner ATL skills in Research, though He! should work on verifying His! source credibility more systematically.
Research.Novice: Student! is currently demonstrating novice ATL skills in Research, and is encouraged to build stronger investigation habits to support His! progress.

Thinking.Expert: Student! consistently demonstrates expert ATL skills in Thinking, applying critical analysis and creative problem-solving skills to complex challenges.
Thinking.Practitioner: Student! generally demonstrates practitioner ATL skills in Thinking, analyzing key issues and reflecting thoughtfully on His! learning journey.
Thinking.Beginner: Student! demonstrates beginner ATL skills in Thinking, though He! should strive to apply his! critical reasoning skills more independently.
Thinking.Novice: Student! is currently demonstrating novice ATL skills in Thinking, and is encouraged to practice how to approach problems from different viewpoints.
